member_long_descriptions: Bed with a beige-and-gray horizontally striped duvet and two matching rectangular pillows set against a dark polished wooden paneled headboard; linens are neatly made with faint creases and the pillows are slightly askew at the head — object occupies the foreground and appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

Dark stained wooden nightstand with three stacked drawers and metal pull handles, rectangular glossy top with small objects visible, carved base molding and curved side detail; mostly full-frontal view with slight shadowing — estimated distance from camera ~1.0 m.

Beige/cream pleated fabric shade lamp with dark vertical ribs and a turned dark wood or bronze base, illuminated and slightly edge-cropped on the left; appears to sit on a bedside surface about 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden nightstand with a single visible drawer and a small round metal knob, varnished rectangular top holding a few objects and partially occluded by the bed in the foreground; appears about 0.6 m from the camera.

Rectangular pillow with horizontal gray-blue and light gray stripes on an off-white woven fabric, slightly flattened and soft-looking, filling the crop and partially edge-cropped at the top-right; appears close to the camera (≈0.5 m).

Warm-lit table lamp with a cream-beige pleated fabric shade featuring dark vertical trim, a curving dark wood or bronze stem with a glossy white glass decorative midsection and a carved dark base; lamp appears upright on a surface and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Mostly visible rectangular beige/cream fabric pillow with horizontal thin gray-blue stripes, smooth cotton-like texture and light surface folds; pillow appears plump and slightly edge-cropped on the left side, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial/edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden dresser showing a glossy rectangular top with visible wood grain and minor surface wear, and two lower drawer fronts with round dark knobs visible; appears close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).

Partial crop of a bed corner showing a beige-gray striped duvet cover with thin darker stripes and light wrinkles draped over the mattress and a visible dark wooden frame; the bed is cut off by the image edge and appears about 0.7 m from the camera.

Dark glossy black flat-screen TV with a reflective, turned-off display showing dim room reflections and small indicator lights; large rectangular panel is partially edge-cropped and appears mounted or very close to a wall, approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
